hello: Hello Innovators! 👋 I'm Sohaib. Building the Infrastructure Behind Your Data.
slogan: A Data Engineer specializing in pipeline architecture, data warehousing, and cloud infrastructure. I build the systems that transform raw, siloed data into reliable, scalable foundations — so your teams can move fast and your decisions are grounded in clean, trustworthy data.
about_desc1: With a foundation in Management Information Systems and hands-on experience across international, data-heavy operations, I specialize in architecting end-to-end data solutions — from raw ingestion and transformation to scalable pipelines and decision-ready dashboards. My work bridges the gap between chaotic data sources and the clean, structured systems that power confident business decisions.
about_desc2: I've built and optimized ETL/ELT workflows, designed data models for cross-regional reporting, and delivered Power BI environments that give stakeholders real-time operational clarity. I bring a systems-first mindset to every engagement — ensuring data is not just visualized, but engineered to be reliable, scalable, and maintainable.
work1_desc: Design and implement ETL/ELT pipelines that move data from source to destination accurately, consistently, and at scale.
work2_desc: Model and structure your data layer — star schemas, fact tables, and dimension tables — so queries are fast and reporting is always consistent.
work3_desc: Plan and execute cloud migrations to AWS, GCP, or Azure with minimal disruption and a clear path to scalable infrastructure.
work4_desc: Orchestrate workflows with Airflow and implement data quality checks that catch issues before they reach your dashboards.
job1_desc: Specialized training in data engineering — building scalable pipelines, architecting data warehouses, and working with distributed systems for large-scale data processing.
job2_desc: Certified in Data Analysis (Power BI & Excel) — delivering end-to-end reporting solutions, data models, and dashboards that translate raw data into strategic insights.
job3_desc: Reviewed and audited large-scale digital data across multiple markets, ensuring accuracy at scale and preparing structured performance reports.
job4_name: Customer Care Advisor – e& Global Services
job4_desc: Managed high-volume customer interactions in Arabic & English across international markets, with exposure to KPI-driven performance measurement systems.
project1_desc: Comprehensive Power BI dashboard analyzing sales performance across regions, payment methods, and product categories with interactive visualizations.
project2_desc: Built a relational model in Power BI linking customer, sales, and product tables — ensuring accurate cross-table reporting and deeper analytical depth.
project3_desc: End-to-end data cleaning and transformation project using Power Query to standardize, enrich, and prepare raw datasets for downstream analysis.
contact_subtitle: Ready to build something great? Let's talk.
footer_about_desc: Building the infrastructure that makes your data trustworthy.
newsletter_desc: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest articles and updates in the world of data engineering.
